title: Restart Scheme statistics to April 2025
body: "This release of statistics covers data from July 2021 to the end of October 2024 on:    referrals to Restart  starts to Restart  first earnings from employment  job outcome rates and performance by contract area, month, and cohort  participant demographics – gender, age   Feedback  We welcome user feedback on plans for the release of these statistics and their scope. If you have comments, email: cep.statistics@dwp.gov.uk "
